title: Carbon Design System from IBM
content: Carbon from Directories: Components: Carbon is IBM's open-source design system for products and digital experiences. Funded and built by IBM, Carbon is open source and available for anyone to use and contribute to. The design system includes detailed guides, components, patterns, principles, standards, and the philosophy of design at IBM. With the as its foundation, the system consists of working code, design tools and resources, human interface guidelines, and a vibrant community of contributors.
